label: go

claimProbes.statement: HER2/ERBB2 gene amplification occurs in roughly 20-30% of breast cancers and is an independent predictor of worse survival, and anti-HER2 therapy improves outcomes in HER2-overexpressing disease.
HER2 overexpression has no bearing on prognosis or treatment selection in breast cancer and is not a validated therapeutic target.

rationale: Foundational, mature approved franchise; amplification-prognosis link and trastuzumab benefit are definitively established.
